prompt:
Generate an actual gameplay screenshot of a non-existent modern urban 3D anime-style open-world RPG. The setting is a high-end lounge-style social space with a visible bar and sofa seating under warm lighting. A conversation event scene showing the main heroine serving with cute service attire and gestures. Other cast members are naturally placed around to create a glamorous and calm adult atmosphere.

Characters should not be high-definition illustrations, but rather cel-shaded 3D character models similar to event scenes in recent bishojo 3D games, featuring rounded faces, simple skin shading, soft hair strands, and a clean 3D model texture with a slight plastic feel.

As a game screen, include a Japanese conversation subtitle window at the bottom, character name display, selection UI, status UI like money or affection level in the top right, and operation UI like skip/log display at the screen edges. Make the dialogue and choices feel realistic, cute, and slightly quirky. The image should look like an actual in-game screenshot rather than promotional art. Overall, emphasize a sophisticated modern 3D anime game aesthetic that is healing, heart-fluttering, and glamorous in an adult way.
